name: hrms
description: Bahir Dar University HRMS - Human Resource Management System

scripts.postinstall: if [ "$VERCEL" != "1" ]; then npm run prisma:generate --workspace=@hrms/backend; else echo 'Skipping prisma on Vercel'; fi
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend

author: Bahir Dar University Team
